<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$front = wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Home','post_name'=>'home','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page'));
update_option('page_on_front', $front);
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Products','post_name'=>'products','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-products')));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'News & Intelligence','post_name'=>'news-intelligence','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-news')));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Login','post_name'=>'login','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-login')));

wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Transfers & Bill Pay','post_name'=>'transfers','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-transfers')));
$blog = wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Blog','post_name'=>'blog','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page'));
update_option('page_for_posts', $blog);
wp_delete_post(2, true);
$c1 = wp_create_category('Global Economy');
$c2 = wp_create_category('Sustainability');
$c3 = wp_create_category('Technology');
$c4 = wp_create_category('Market Analysis');
$c5 = wp_create_category('Policy Watch');
$c6 = wp_create_category('Innovation');
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'The Impact of Central Bank Pivot on Emerging Markets','post_name'=>'central-bank-pivot','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'post','post_content'=>'The institutional landscape for digital assets is undergoing a seismic shift.','post_category'=>array($c1)));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'The Rise of Green Bonds','post_name'=>'green-bonds','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'post','post_content'=>'ESG-focused assets are outperforming traditional benchmarks.','post_category'=>array($c2)));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Security in the Age of Quantum Computing','post_name'=>'quantum-computing','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'post','post_content'=>'Pioneering post-quantum encryption for financial data.','post_category'=>array($c3)));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Navigating Volatility in Emerging Markets','post_name'=>'emerging-markets','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'post','post_content'=>'Analysis of algorithmic trading in high-inflation environments.','post_category'=>array($c4)));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'AI and The Future of Risk Management','post_name'=>'ai-risk-management','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'post','post_content'=>'How generative models redefine credit scoring and fraud detection.','post_category'=>array($c6)));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Monetary Policy: The 2025 Transition','post_name'=>'monetary-policy-2025','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'post','post_content'=>'Expert perspectives on the shifting interest rate landscape.','post_category'=>array($c5)));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Main Menu','post_name'=>'main-menu','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'wp_navigation','post_content'=>'<!-- wp:navigation-link {"label":"Home","url":"/","kind":"custom","isTopLevelLink":true} /--><!-- wp:navigation-link {"label":"Products","url":"/products/","kind":"custom","isTopLevelLink":true} /--><!-- wp:navigation-link {"label":"Intelligence","url":"/news-intelligence/","kind":"custom","isTopLevelLink":true} /--><!-- wp:navigation-link {"label":"Dashboard","url":"/dashboard/","kind":"custom","isTopLevelLink":true} /-->'));
